title: deer-flow.citation.missing v1
description: Emitted by deerflow.bus.emit_citation_missing() (packages/harness/deerflow/bus.py) when web tools were called during a turn but the final response contains no citation markers or URLs. Non-blocking signal consumed by autobench/claims to track hallucination risk. Validated against event['data'].

model_name.description: Model that produced the uncited response.

web_tools_used.description: Names of the web-search/fetch tools invoked during the turn.

response_chars.description: Character length of the final response text.
